ms-python.pythoncall-tas-error.comment: Logs when calls to the experiment service fails

errortype.comment: Type of error when calling TAS (ServerError, NoResponse, etc.)

failed.comment: Whether there was a failure. Common to most of the events.

failurecategory.comment: A reason that we generate (e.g. kerneldied, noipykernel, etc), more like a category of the error. Common to most of the events.

ms-python.pythonquery-expfeature.comment: Logs queries to the experiment service by feature for metric calculations
